# Meditations on First Philosophy

*[Descartes](../philosophers/descartes.md) · 1641*

Six meditations in which Descartes, through the most radical doubt, seeks an indubitable foundation for knowledge: he finds it in the cogito, then re-establishes the existence of God, the distinction of mind and body, and the truth of the external world.
